title: Speech Signal Processing
author: Seema Nayak
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this article we discussed one of the most intricate and fascinating signals ever to be studied, human speech.  Speech synthesis is the artificial generation of understandable and (hopefully) natural-sounding speech. If coupled with a set of rules for reading text, rules that in some languages are simple but in others quite complex, we get text-to-speech conversion.
steps_raw: In this article we discussed one of the most intricate and fascinating signals ever to be studied, human speech.  Speech synthesis is the artificial generation of understandable and (hopefully) natural-sounding speech. If coupled with a set of rules for reading text, rules that in some languages are simple but in others quite complex, we get text-to-speech conversion.
